notes: Counterfactual stETH/WETH Morpho Blue market at T0 = 2022-05-11 09:00 UTC. Loan asset is WETH; supply/borrow assets are denominated in WETH. The oracle reports stETH price in USD (rather than stETH/WETH ratio) for compatibility with the framework's USD-denominated price series; our scenario engine converts internally.
